dataList.name: Limbus Company Specialized Custom Prosthetic Prototype mk5 - Dokkaebi Arms
dataList.desc:
Начало битвы: Получает [AengduNewArm]

Если there is an ally при менее чем 50% ХП on the field excluding this unit, получает 1 [SupportProtect] (один раз за ход)
dataList.flavor:
"On the outside, it looks no different from prostheses you might find in other Nests или Backstreets... But apparently, this particular prosthetic limb has been created using technology unique to Limbus Company. I wonder what that could be..."

"Since the development of this prototype was led by the LCD Department, I would assume it has something to do with the power of Distortions... Oh, that's not to say that I have any certainty regarding the matter—I was only in charge of transporting it, you see. It's just a simple speculation, really. In any case, I doubt this is your average prosthetic limb meant for body enhancement."

dataList.name: Demonfire Spinecleaver
dataList.desc:
Skill End: Получает 1 [WindBlade] за каждые 3  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> (макс. 5, 2 раз за ход)

On Base Attack Skill End: При 15+ [WindBlade], activate "Even the Balance - Lucent Rippling Flame" on the enemy (один раз за ход)

On Defense Skill Clash Теряет, Если у этого юнита есть 3+ [Agility], this unit cannot be Staggered from taking урона until Defense Skill End, и activate "To Claim Their Bones" against the enemy after being hit (2 раз за ход, excluding forced Staggers)
dataList.summary: Activate дополнительный Skill когда conditions are met

dataList.name: Swiftblade
dataList.desc: On Crit, получает 1 [Agility] на следующий ход (3 times per Skill, 2 раз за ход)

dataList.name: To Where I Must Return
dataList.desc:
Когда 3 или more other Blade Lineage allies are defeated:
- Когда gaining  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> Potency/Count using this unit's own Skills и Coin effects: Получает 1 more of each
- Когда 5 или more other Blade Lineage allies are defeated, получает 2 more of each вместо этого
- Начало столкновения: Накладывает [SwordPlayOfTheHomeland] на себе

dataList.name: Fugitive
dataList.desc: Upon entering the Encounter for the first time, получает [BrandedKimSatgat]

dataList.name: Bearing of a Salsu
dataList.desc:
При 1 счётчика  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color>, теряет 10 ХП вместо этого of losing счётчика  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> (this effect cannot Stagger this unit и не drop this unit's ХП below 1)

Наносит +(missing ХП percentage на себе / 2) урона on Critical Hit using Базовые скиллы (макс. 50%)

dataList.name: Swordplay of the Homeland
dataList.desc:
Начало столкновения: Если Pride Reson. was activated,
- Получает (Pride Reson. x 2)  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> (макс. 8)
- Накладывает 1 [SlashResultUp] и 1 [CriticalDamageUp] on all Sinners и Assist Units excluding this unit (for Blade Lineage targets, double this effect)

Конец хода: Получает ( <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> на себе / 4) [Agility] на следующий ход (макс. 6, округляется вниз)

dataList.name: Blade Lineage Mentor
dataList.desc:
Когда gaining  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> Potency/Count using this unit's own Skills и Coin effects: Накладывает 1  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> Potency и 1 счётчика  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> on the Sinner и 2 Assist Units that do not have  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> или have the lowest  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> Potency (excluding this unit)
- For Blade Lineage allies, накладывает 3  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> Potency и +2 счётчика  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> вместо этого

Когда a Blade Lineage Sinner или Assist Unit is defeated, this unit loses 10 IQ

dataList.name: Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones
dataList.desc:
в этой битве, когда this unit takes урона that brings its ХП down to 0, nullify that урона; then, this unit's ХП cannot drop below 1 for the turn (один раз за бой)

Конец хода: При 30+  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> Potency, fix this unit's Speed to 20 на следующий ход и equip "Yield My Flesh" on the leftmost Skill Slot
- Если "Yield My Flesh" becomes inaccessible due to Skill effect, this effect не activate

dataList.name: Fate Lost
dataList.desc: Теряет this Encounter если this unit is killed
dataList.flavor: One may get lost и wander onto the wrong path, but willful defiance или deviation from the flow are forbidden by "it."

dataList.name: Dimensional Bag [Ezra]
dataList.desc:
Начало битвы: Получает 1 [DimensionalBagEzraA]

Если this unit used the current Workshop weapon more than once, switch weapons the на следующий ход

List of weapons:
- Allas Workshop Gloves
- Nester Workshop Hammer
- Screw Atelier Drill Hammer
- Namir Workshop Gauntlets
- YuRia Atelier Axe
